name: 82-0 Solver
description: Automated solvers for the viral basketball roster game 82-0.com. Two agents reach a perfect 82-0 season by different philosophies: one guarantees the win by controlling the game's randomness, the other wins legitimately through fast repeated attempts. Includes the reverse-engineering and tooling behind them.

name: Escape Transylvania
description: A browser-based point-and-click escape room set in Castle Dracula. Explore rooms, inspect and collect objects, and solve puzzles to escape before dawn. Progress is saved locally.

name: Yung Hung Jung: Rent's Due
description: A browser puzzle-platformer. Yung Hung Jung is behind on rent — hustle through 10 levels, dodge the landlord's collectors, and grab the cash at the end of each one.

name: Alexa's Bed Bug Battle
description: A 2D puzzle platformer across 10 hand-built levels, packed into a single self-contained HTML file with no build step — music and sound effects are generated procedurally with the Web Audio API.
